synopsis: [El-errata] ELSA-2025-23086 Moderate: Oracle Linux 8 luksmeta security update
description:
[9-4.1]
- Fix handling of large metadata
  Resolves: RHEL-122138
full_text:
Oracle Linux Security Advisory ELSA-2025-23086

http://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELSA-2025-23086.html

The following updated rpms for Oracle Linux 8 have been uploaded to the Unbreakable Linux Network:

x86_64:
libluksmeta-9-4.el8_10.1.i686.rpm
libluksmeta-9-4.el8_10.1.x86_64.rpm
libluksmeta-devel-9-4.el8_10.1.i686.rpm
libluksmeta-devel-9-4.el8_10.1.x86_64.rpm
luksmeta-9-4.el8_10.1.x86_64.rpm

aarch64:
libluksmeta-9-4.el8_10.1.aarch64.rpm
libluksmeta-devel-9-4.el8_10.1.aarch64.rpm
luksmeta-9-4.el8_10.1.aarch64.rpm


SRPMS:
http://oss.oracle.com/ol8/SRPMS-updates/luksmeta-9-4.el8_10.1.src.rpm

Related CVEs:

CVE-2025-11568




Description of changes:

[9-4.1]
- Fix handling of large metadata
  Resolves: RHEL-122138
